content.en:
"Jiu'er, is the Xuanxu Ancient Realm going to be promoted?"

Ye Tian came to Ouyang Jiu'er and asked.

"Well, in these 10,000 years!"

Ouyang Jiu'er affirmed.

Ye Tian listened, and there was a little preparation in his heart.

Ouyang Jiu'er said again: "The promotion of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, although it is not a big opportunity, it is far from being compared with the opportunity to be promoted to the Forbidden Realm, but at the moment of promotion, if you grasp the opportunity, you can still get great benefits." "

"Oh, what's the big deal?"

Ye Tian didn't know much about this kind of secret, so he was very curious.

Ouyang Jiu'er explained: "The biggest difference between the Ancient Realm and the Ancient Realm is not the size and strength of the rules, but the Ancient Realm will produce primeval chaotic lifeforms, they are equivalent to some innate gods and demons in the universe, but their bloodlines are many times stronger than the innate gods and demons. Many Dao Ancestors of the Upper Triple Heaven Force are Ancient Chaos Beings, you should have heard of it!"

"Ancient Chaos Life, so that's it!"

Ye Tian understood.

Before, the Force Demon Dao Ancestor he killed was also an Ancient Chaos Life, and he thought that the Ancient Chaos Life was born from Chaos, but he didn't expect it to be born from the Ancient Realm.

"Once the primeval chaos life is conceived, under the protection of the rules of the ancient realm, even the invincible Dao Ancestor will not dare to destroy it. However, when the Ancient Realm was just born, many primeval chaotic origin qi would be generated, and these primeval chaotic origin qi would be the foundation for the primeval chaos life in the future. Once we have refined the Ancient Chaos Origin Qi and are able to strengthen the Origin, this is a very great opportunity for many True Ancestors. Of course, it's the same for us, we can first collect a large amount of Ancient Chaos Origin Qi, and then start to impact the Dao Ancestor Realm, refining the Ancient Chaos Origin Qi, then we can grow the Supreme Dao Source in one fell swoop, saving countless years of penance!" Ouyang Jiu'er said.

Few people know about this kind of secret, because even in the Divine Heaven Realm, it is very rare for the Ancient Realm to be promoted to the Ancient Realm, and most of the Domain Realms are directly created by the Domain Ancestors, and they have not experienced the world level of the Ancient Realm and the Ancient Realm.

In the Divine Heaven Realm, although many powerhouses have created the Ancient Realm, they have always been in the Ancient Realm form from beginning to end, and there is no way to promote them.

Therefore, very few strong people knew the primeval chaos origin qi, and even some primeval chaos beings did not know the primeval chaos origin qi.

"Brother Ye, the primeval chaos origin qi can't be stored in the world and storage space, you can use the forbidden strange things that contain space to collect it, so that it won't escape!" Ouyang Jiu'er reminded again.

"Got it!"

Ye Tianying said.

......

Time passed little by little, and the day when the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was promoted to the Ancient Realm was getting closer and closer.

At this time, many of the Upper Triple Heaven forces also knew about the promotion of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

However, there are not many powerhouses who know the secrets of the primeval chaos origin qi, and even if it is a powerful person, they may not reveal this news, because the more people who know, the greater the competition.

The Ancient Chaos Origin Qi would only appear when the Ancient Realm was just born, and the number would definitely not be too much, if there were too many people collected, it would be difficult for him to collect much.

Therefore, most people who know the secret will hide it.

But.

Ye Tian told his wife, sister, son, and daughter that they would also collect the Ancient Chaos Origin Qi.

this day.

The Xuanxu Ancient Realm finally ushered in a transformation, and a large number of Dao Ancestors in the Dao Mountain Realm also stood outside the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, waiting for the Xuanxu Ancient Realm to be promoted to the Ancient Realm, and after the rules were stable, they immediately entered the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Bang!!!!

The Xuanxu Ancient Realm began to expand wildly, swallowing the chaotic energy in the chaos.

Endless chaotic vitality poured into the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, which was like a gourd swallowing the seawater of the entire sea in the sea, and the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was such a picture in the chaos at this time.

Ten times over!

Hundredfold!

A thousandfold!

The Xuanxu Ancient Realm is becoming bigger and bigger, and those Dao Realms in the chaos are like a grain of sand and a sea of sand compared to the current Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

The Xuanxu Ancient Realm is being promoted, the rules are constantly becoming stronger, and the origin of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is also growing wildly, and even some domain fragments have gradually been absorbed by the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, turning into primeval continents.

About ten years have passed, and the promotion process of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is about to come to an end.

At this time, the primeval chaos origin qi began to be born.

Whew!!!

Everywhere in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, a True Ancestor or Dao Ancestor woke up and began to search for the primeval chaos origin qi in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Ye Tian let his family look for him near the Void Heaven True Country, in this way, his body would be in the Void Heaven True Country, and once they were in danger, he would be able to support them in time.

And the task of finding the primeval chaos origin qi was given to the copy body!

On a certain nascent continent of the Void Heaven True Country, an incomparably ancient aura was suspended on a mountain like a rule.

This wisp of breath is the primeval chaos origin qi!

If no one takes away this wisp of primeval chaos origin qi, after a long time, an primeval chaos life will be born here.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian tore through the space and descended, took out a forbidden strange object similar to a gourd, and urged this forbidden strange object to take away this wisp of primeval chaotic origin qi.

In this way, Ye Tian continued to walk in the territory of the Void Heaven True Kingdom and its annexes.

The Xuanxu Ancient Realm has now become too big, and there are too many Blank Ownerless Realms, so even if the True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors are looking for the Ancient Chaos Origin Qi, there will hardly be any conflict.

A wisp!

Two wisps!

Three wisps!

......

Ye Tian obtained more and more Ancient Chaos Origin Qi, but Ye Tian knew very well that it was impossible for him and the other powerhouses to take away all the Ancient Chaos Origin Qi, at most a very small part of it.

After all, the primeval chaos origin qi did not exist for a long time, and once the ancient realm was completely born, it would begin to give birth to primeval chaos life in a short period of time.

At that time, no one could take it away!

Time passed slowly, and the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was finally completely promoted.

Rumble!!!!

One after another, the ancient Dao Ancestors woke up from the Sleeping Sealed Land, and one by one released the breath of the Dao Ancestors, announcing their return.

In almost every force headquarters, a large amount of Dao Ancestor aura penetrated through the void of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, turning into a huge figure, overlooking the heavens and the earth.

Of course.

There are also forces that are relatively low-key, as if there is no movement, and one of them is Black Wind Mountain, which is still as usual.

The Mitian Sect, the Tianhai Sect, and the Ten Thousand Domains Divine Temple were more arrogant, and a large number of Dao Ancestors began to take action to grab the territory as quickly as possible.

After all, the territory of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is too big now, and many of them are borderless lands, so if you don't seize it at this time, when will you seize it?

Of course.

The Upper Triple Heaven Force and the Middle Triple Heaven Force also sent many Dao Ancestors to leave the Xuanxu Ancient Realm one after another and enter the chaos of the Dao Mountain Realm.

They were also very interested in the wider Chaos.

The reshuffle of forces has begun!
